schedule_slot_classroom_time_unique_idx.name: schedule_slot_classroom_time_unique_idx
schedule_slot_classroom_time_unique_idx.where: classroom_id IS NOT NULL AND day_of_week IS NOT NULL AND slot_index IS NOT NULL

schedule_time_config_break_consistency.name: schedule_time_config_break_consistency
schedule_time_config_break_consistency.value: ("schedule_time_config"."has_break" = false AND "schedule_time_config"."break_after_slot" IS NULL) OR ("schedule_time_config"."has_break" = true AND "schedule_time_config"."break_after_slot" IS NOT NULL AND "schedule_time_config"."break_after_slot" > 0)
